    toc: true
    toc_float: true

    reference_docx: south_africa_variety_data_report_final.docx

  pdf_document: default
  slidy_presentation: default
always_allow_html: yes
---


# Contents

- Dataset from CSW 

- Exploratory Data Analysis & retrospective

- Power Analysis

  1. Romania  
  2. Hungary
  3. Ukraine  
  4. France  
  5. Italy
  6. Poland
  7. Spain
  8. Turkey
  9. Greece
  10. Portugal
  11. Czech
  


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# APT Trials Optimization

- The goal is to optimize the Agronomy Corn APT Trial network based on power analysis using data from 2024 trials 


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>



 

```{r message=FALSE,warnings=FALSE,eval=F,echo=F}
library(bigrquery)
library(dplyr)
#install.packages("wk")
library(wk)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

source("/mnt/codes/PowerAnalysis_LxR_12Fgp.R")

#cfv_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/EME_MD_CFV_fields_info_28thJan2024.xlsx")
#library(sparklyr)
#spark_install(version = "2.4")
#spark_install()
#sc <- spark_connect(master="local")

#binstall.packages("sparkbq")
#library(sparkbq)

source("/mnt/codes/DIT_functions (1) (2) (1).R")

library(readxl)


#source("/mnt/codes/DIT_functions (1).R")

#dit_dashboard = read_excel("/mnt/data/2023-DIT-EMEA-Corn-Grain_Dashboard.xlsx")

#names(dit_dashboard)[11] ="velocity_field_name"

#elocity_field_names = unique(dit_dashboard$velocity_field_name)



.reqp <- c("jsonlite", "httr", "vaultr", "bigrquery")


.loadlibs <- sapply(X = .reqp, function(p) {

  if(!(p %in% rownames(installed.packages()))) {

    install.packages(p, quiet = T, repos = "https://cran.rstudio.com")

  }

  library(p, character.only = T, warn.conflicts = F)

})



.vault <- vault_client(login = T, quiet = T,
                       role_id = approle_id_csw,
                       secret_id = approle_secret_csw)

.vault_scrt <- .vault$read('secret/csw/service-identities/emeamdfieldtrialanalytics',

                           metadata = T)

### Transform the secret into a readable JSON

.scrt_json <- rawToChar(base64_dec(.vault_scrt$data))



### Authorize bigrquery to view and manage BigQuery projects

.project <-"bcs-market-dev-lake"


bq_auth(path = .scrt_json)


```

# Querying CSW for getting the trial data

**bcs-global-md-fi-lake.field_trial.v_velocity_br_all** table in CSW has the data from Velocity EMEA Agronomy trials.

- Data from 2024 Agronomy/MD trials

- Data from fields with yield data from the following countries:

  1. Romania  
  2. Hungary
  3. Ukraine  
  4. France  
  5. Italy  
  6. Poland


# Power Analysis

The Power analysis for multi-location trials with 1- or 2-factor treatments

**Purpose:**
The Power analysis is based on the t-test for testing 
Ho: no difference between two means versus 
Ha: the difference between two means is d% of overall mean. 

Power analysis is used to estimate the number of locations so that the conclusion claimed can be ensured with a desired confidence when conducting a trial to evaluate treatments with experimental design CR(Complete Randomized), RCB(Randomized Complete Block), Split Plot design.

Power:  

The probability of rejecting the null hypothesis (Ho: Delta=0; no difference between two means) when it is false. Or, the probability of accepting the alternative hypothesis (Ha: two means are different) when it is true.
How to use the Power chart? Use an example to illustrate how to get the minimun location number required from the power chart: when 80% power is desired, draw a horizontal line at 80% (say line-P). if 10% difference is assumed between means of null and alternative hypothsis, draw a vertical line (say line-d) from the intersection of the power curve for 10% and line-P, then the minimun number required is the first integer at the right hand side of line-d.


Factors related to the power and location number determination:  

Power depends on several quantities including: rep# per location, variation(MSE and location by treatments variances), significance level(alpha), the desired true difference between two treatment means and the study design.



```{r message=FALSE,warnings=FALSE,echo=F,eval=F}
con <- dbConnect(
  bigquery(),
  project = "bcs-global-md-fi-lake",
  dataset = "field_trial"
)


plot_current <- tbl(con, "v_velocity_br_all")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(plot_current,regional_hub=="Europe Middle East Africa")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,planting_year==2024) 



orgs = c("Breeding","Market Development")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,organization%in% orgs)

countries = c("Ethiopia","South Africa","Tanzania","Malawi","Zambia","Kenya")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,!country%in% countries)

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1, !is.na(country))

velocity_emea_2= velocity_emea_1 %>% select(organization,planting_year,market,country,state,county,protocol_name,experiment_name,field_name,homesite_name,field_coordinates) %>% collect() 

#%>% unique()

velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_2 %>% unique()

velocity_emea_4  = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(field_name))

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"/mnt/data/md_breeding_location_coordinates.csv")

unique_fields = velocity_emea_4 %>% dplyr::select(organization,planting_year,market,country,state,field_name,homesite_name,field_coordinates) %>% unique()

write_csv(unique_fields,"/mnt/data/unique_md_breeding_location_coordinates.csv")


library(sf)
plot_field_coordinates = st_as_sf(unique_fields, wkt=c("field_coordinates"), crs=4326)


test_field_coordinates = plot_field_coordinates %>% group_by(field_name) %>% summarise(test_field_boundary = st_combine( polygon )) %>% st_convex_hull()

whole_field_coordinates = inner_join(whole_field_coordinates,test_field_coordinates)
whole_field_coordinates = as.data.frame(whole_field_coordinates)
save(whole_field_coordinates,file="/mnt/field_reports_2025/velocity_data/whole_field_coordinates.RData")

#field_boundary$Trial = git3_shape$Trial[1]

# names(field_boundary)[1] = "test_field_boundary"
#field_boundary=as.data.frame(field_boundary)
plot_field_coordinates$centroid <- st_centroid(plot_field_coordinates$polygon)

#plot_field_coordinates = plot_field_coordinates %>% mutate(number_of_densities = length(unique(prx.df$Popultn)))

plot_field_coordinates <- plot_field_coordinates %>%
    mutate(longitude = unlist(purrr::map(plot_field_coordinates$centroid,1)),
           latitude = unlist(purrr::map(plot_field_coordinates$centroid,2))) 

#plot_field_coordinates$polygon = NULL
plot_field_coordinates$centroid = NULL

plot_field_coordinates = as.data.frame(plot_field_coordinates)


```

bcs-global-md-fi-lake.field_trial.v_fts_all

```{r message=FALSE,warnings=FALSE,echo=F,eval=F}
con <- dbConnect(
  bigquery(),
  project = "bcs-global-md-fi-lake",
  dataset = "field_trial"
)


plot_current <- tbl(con, "v_fts_all")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(plot_current,region=="EMEA")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,trial_year==2022) 



orgs = c("Technology Development")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,pipeline_function%in% orgs)

countries = c("Turkey","France","Italy","Greece","Ukraine","Portugal","Hungary","Romania","Czech Republic","Spain")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,country%in% countries)

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1, !is.na(country))

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1, crop_name %in% c("Corn"))

velocity_emea_2 = velocity_emea_1 %>% collect()

#%>% collect()


traits = c("YLD","SYLD")

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_2, observation_ref_cd %in% traits)

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(field_name))

table(velocity_emea_3$is_deactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_plot_deactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_dsr_deactivated)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,is_deactivated==FALSE )
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,is_dsr_deactivated==FALSE )
table(velocity_emea_3$is_rejected)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_abandoned)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,is_abandoned==FALSE )

table(velocity_emea_3$is_deactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_plot_deactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_dsr_deactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$is_rejected)

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,is.na() )
velocity_emea_3$value = as.double(velocity_emea_3$num_value)
#velocity_emea_3$value = as.double(velocity_emea_3$value)


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Czech Republic" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Czechia_fact_data_2022.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Spain" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Spain_fact_data_2022.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Greece" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Greece_fact_data_2022.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Italy" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Italy_silage_fact_data_2022.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Turkey" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"turkey_silage_fact_data_2022.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Portugal" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Portugal_silage_fact_data_2022.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Romania" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2022.csv")

velocity_emea_5 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Hungary" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_5,"Hungary_fact_data_2022.csv")



velocity_emea_7 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="France" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_7,"France_fact_data_2022.csv")

velocity_emea_8 = filter(velocity_emea_3,country=="Ukraine" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_8,"Ukraine_fact_data_2022.csv")



```


## Romania



```{r message=FALSE,warnings=FALSE,echo=F,eval=F}
con <- dbConnect(
  bigquery(),
  project = "bcs-global-md-fi-lake",
  dataset = "field_trial"
)


plot_current <- tbl(con, "v_velocity_br_all")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(plot_current,regional_hub=="Europe Middle East Africa")

#countries = c("Romania","France","Hungary","Ukraine","Italy","Poland")

countries = c("Czechia","Spain","Greece","Italy","Türkiye","Portugal")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,organization=="Market Development")

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,originating_country%in% countries)

velocity_emea_1 = filter(velocity_emea_1,planting_year==2024) 

velocity_emea_2 = velocity_emea_1 %>% collect()

#%>% collect()
velocity_emea_2 = filter(velocity_emea_2, !crops %in% c("OSR-Canola","TRZAW - Wheat, winter"))

traits = c("GYLD","SYLD")

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_2, questioncode %in% traits)

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(field_name))

table(velocity_emea_3$isdeactivated)
table(velocity_emea_3$ese_isdeactivated)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,isdeactivated=="False" )
#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3,is.na() )
velocity_emea_3$value = as.double(velocity_emea_3$value)
velocity_emea_3$value = as.double(velocity_emea_3$value)


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Czechia" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Czechia_fact_data_2024.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Spain" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Spain_fact_data_2024.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Greece" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Greece_fact_data_2024.csv")


velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Italy" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Italy_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Türkiye" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"turkey_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Portugal" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Portugal_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_4 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Romania" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_5 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Hungary" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_5,"Hungary_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_6 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Poland" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_6,"Poland_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_7 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="France" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_7,"France_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_8 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Ukraine" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_8,"Ukraine_fact_data_2024.csv")


velocity_emea_9 = filter(velocity_emea_3,originating_country=="Italy" )

write_csv(velocity_emea_9,"Italy_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_summary %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% mutate(number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),mean_yield_expt=mean(mean_yield, na.rm=T), sd_yield_expt=sd(mean_yield, na.rm=T),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=((minimum_yield_diff)/mean_yield_expt)*100,maximum_yield_diff_percent=((maximum_yield_diff)/mean_yield_expt)*100)


velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100)

#velocity_emea_4_summary = filter(velocity_emea_4_summary,originating_country=="Romania" )


velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_summary %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% mutate(number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),mean_yield_expt=mean(mean_yield, na.rm=T), sd_yield_expt=sd(mean_yield, na.rm=T),min_difference_percent_expt=mean(min_difference_percent),max_difference_percent_expt=mean(max_difference_percent))

field_test = filter(velocity_emea_3,field_name=="2024_CG_ROU_CP_RM105_SANICOLAU MARE")

field_test$value = as.double(field_test$value)

model= lm(value~product_name, data=field_test)

sqrt(mean(model$residuals^2))

library(SpATS)
model <- SpATS(response = "value", 
                 spatial = ~ PSANOVA(ranges, columns),
                 genotype = "product_name", 
                 data = field_test)

protocols = velocity_emea_2 %>% dplyr::select(organization,season,requester,planting_year,crops,originating_country,experiment_name,field_name) %>% unique()

protocols = filter(protocols, !is.na(field_name))


```






```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcompView)

source("/mnt/codes/PowerAnalysis_LxR_12Fgp.R")

#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)

velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,uomcode,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name,uomcode) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,uomcode) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name,uomcode) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
##summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100



velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_105")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_105")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test



 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_95")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_95")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_100")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_ROU_GRAIN_100")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1







```





## Hungary

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Hungary_fact_data_2024.csv")
unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)




velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)

velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_14",value*10,value))


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_95")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_95")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_100")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_HU_GRAIN_100")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_HU_DeFACT")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_HU_DeFACT")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
```




## Ukraine  


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Ukraine_fact_data_2024.csv")
unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_UA_GRAIN_90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_UA_GRAIN_90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_UA_GRAIN_95")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME4_UA_GRAIN_95")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_UA_GRAIN_85")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_UA_GRAIN_85")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN ME2B_UA_GRAIN_80")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN ME2B_UA_GRAIN_80")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
```



## France  

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("France_fact_data_2024.csv")
unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(value))


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield, na.rm=T),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield, na.rm=T),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV, na.rm=T),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV, na.rm=T),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV, na.rm=T),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent, na.rm=T),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent, na.rm=T),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent, na.rm=T)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff, na.rm=T)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent, na.rm=T)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
##summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM85")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM85")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM95")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME3_FR_RM95")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_FR_RM100")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_FR_RM100")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_FR_RM105")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_FR_RM105")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1
```

## ITALY Late RM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Italy_fact_data_2024.csv")
unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_FACTA")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_FACTA")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_FACTB")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_FACTB")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_SSC")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_SSC")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_DFACT300")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_DFACT300")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_DFACT400")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME6_ITA_DFACT400")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

```



## Italy - Silage Trials


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Italy_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")
 unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_1st_Crop")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_1st_Crop")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_2st_Crop")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_2st_Crop")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_DFACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_1st_Crop")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_DFACTS_SILAGE_ME6_ITA_1st_Crop")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1






```


## POLAND Early RM


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Poland_fact_data_2024.csv")
unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")
```
