```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_80")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_80")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_85")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_85")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_PL_GRAIN_90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

```

## Spain


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Spain_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis - Duero

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_DUERO_RM100")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_DUERO_RM100")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_DUERO_RM105")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME5_DUERO_RM105")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_ME5_CORN_FACT_DUERO_SSC")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_ME5_CORN_FACT_DUERO_SSC")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

```


### Power Analysis - Ebro & South

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_DIT_GRAIN_SPAIN_EBRO_LATE")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_DIT_GRAIN_SPAIN_EBRO_LATE")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_DIT_GRAIN_SPAIN_EBRO_2nd_Crop")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_DIT_GRAIN_SPAIN_EBRO_2nd_Crop")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_SPAIN_SOUTH_RM115_120")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_SPAIN_SOUTH_RM115_120")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

```


## Turkey


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("turkey_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")
 unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, is.na(ese_isdeactivated))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_1st_Crop")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_1st_Crop")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_CA_RM103_107")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_CA_RM103_107")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_GAP_RM110-115")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_GAP_RM110-115")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_SSC")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_TUR_SSC")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1



expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_TUR_RM115_121")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_TUR_RM115_121")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

```


## Greece


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Greece_fact_data_2024.csv")
 unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_GRE_RM100-105")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_GRE_RM100-105")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_GRE_RM113-120")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_GRE_RM113-120")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_Greece_RM115-120")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_Greece_RM115-120")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1


expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_MINISTRIPS_ME7_GREECE_RM110_120_SUB")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_MINISTRIPS_ME7_GREECE_RM110_120_SUB")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1





```


## Portugal


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Portugal_silage_fact_data_2024.csv")
 unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_PORT_SOUTH_RM115_120")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_GRAIN_ME7_PORT_SOUTH_RM115_120")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_PORT_RM100-110")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_PORT_RM100-110")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_PORT_RM115-120")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_CORN_FACTS_SILAGE_ME7_PORT_RM115-120")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary
expt1 = filter(expt1, product_name!="EY4159")
 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1






```







## Czechia


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


#write_csv(velocity_emea_4,"Romania_fact_data_2024.csv")

velocity_emea_3 = read_csv("Czechia_fact_data_2024.csv")
 unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, uomcode!="BU50_AC_0")
velocity_emea_3 = velocity_emea_3 %>% mutate(value = ifelse(uomcode=="MTON_HA_0",value*10,value))

unique(velocity_emea_3$uomcode)
velocity_emea_3_overall_summary = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name))) 

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_overall_summary)

velocity_emea_3_fields = velocity_emea_3 %>% dplyr::select(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity,product_name,value,planting_year) %>% unique()

velocity_emea_3_fields_summary = velocity_emea_3_fields %>% group_by(originating_country,key_terms,planting_year,experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_fields = length(unique(field_name)),number_of_hybrids_tested=length(unique(product_name)), fields= paste(unique(field_name), collapse="; "),Hybrids= paste(unique(product_name), collapse="; ") )

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_3_fields_summary, filter="top")

#fields with yield


```



### Calculating Coefficient of variation


Low CV: Generally considered to be below 15.9%. This indicates low variability and high precision in the measurements or observations.

Medium CV: Ranges from approximately 16% to 30%. This suggests moderate variability, indicating that there is some inconsistency in the data.

High CV: Values above 30%, which indicate high variability and lower precision in the measurements.


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}

#velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, questioncode=="GYLD")


velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)




velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name,field_name,set_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_3 = as.data.frame(velocity_emea_3)


velocity_emea_4_field_summary= velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% dplyr::summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), Raw_CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100)

#DT::datatable(velocity_emea_4_field_summary, filter="top")

velocity_emea_4_mutate = velocity_emea_3 %>% group_by(field_name) %>% mutate(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100,yield_diff=value-mean_yield,yield_diff_percent=(yield_diff/mean_yield)*100,min_yield_diff= min(yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(yield_diff),mean_yield_diff=mean(abs(yield_diff)),mean_yield_diff_percent=mean(abs(yield_diff_percent)))

#velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(originating_country,state, county, l3_name,market,sub_market,testing_stage,key_terms,requester, answer_user_id,submission_id,field_name,sub_site_id,randomizationStrategyCode,total_area,total_area_uom,plot_length,plot_width,set_name, experiment_name,setid, rep, block_id,questioncode,uomcode,maturity) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),mean_yield=mean(value, na.rm=T), sd_yield=sd(value, na.rm=T), CV=(sd_yield/mean_yield)*100,min_yield= min(value),max_yield=max(value),min_difference_percent=((mean_yield-min_yield)/mean_yield)*100,max_difference_percent=((max_yield-mean_yield)/mean_yield)*100, min_yield_diff= min(min_yield_diff),max_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff))

velocity_emea_4_summary = velocity_emea_4_mutate %>% group_by(experiment_name) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids_test= length(unique(product_name)),number_of_fields= length(unique(field_name)),mean_expt_yield = mean(mean_yield),sd_expt_yield = sd(mean_yield),mean_CV_per_experiment= mean(CV),min_CV_per_experiment= min(CV),max_CV_per_experiment= max(CV),minimum_yield_diff=min(min_yield_diff),maximum_yield_diff=max(max_yield_diff),minimum_yield_diff_percent=min(min_difference_percent),maximum_yield_diff_percent=max(max_difference_percent),mean_maximum_difference_percent=(mean(maximum_yield_diff_percent)),mean_yield_difference=(mean(mean_yield_diff)),mean_yield_difference_percent=(mean(mean_yield_diff_percent)))
```

### Power Analysis

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=7, fig.width=15}
 model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=velocity_emea_3)
#summary(model)
library(sjstats)
rmse=rmse(model)
mean=mean(velocity_emea_3$value)

cv = (rmse/mean)*100

cv

velocity_emea_3 = filter(velocity_emea_3, !is.na(product_name))

#per experiment
expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_CZ_GRAIN_85")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2024_FACT_CORN_ME2B_CZ_GRAIN_85")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1

expt1 = filter(velocity_emea_3,experiment_name=="2023_FACT_CORN_ME2B_CZ_GRAIN_90")

expt1_summary=velocity_emea_4_summary %>% filter(experiment_name=="2023_FACT_CORN_ME2B_CZ_GRAIN_90")

mean_yield_difference = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference,1)
mean_yield_difference_percent = round(expt1_summary$mean_yield_difference_percent,1)
number_of_fields = expt1_summary$number_of_fields
number_of_hybrids_test = expt1_summary$number_of_hybrids_test

velocity_emea_4_summary

 model_1 = lmer(value ~ as.factor(product_name)  + (1|field_name),data=expt1)
#summary(model_1)
library(sjstats)
rmse_1=rmse(model_1)
mean_1=mean(expt1$value)

cv_1 = (rmse_1/mean_1)*100

cv_1


expdesign="F11"; minrep=2;  maxrep=40;  cv=round(cv_1,2);  ckmean=round(mean_1,2);   rLGvsE=30; nsub=1;
ntrt1=number_of_hybrids_test;  ntrt2=3; alpha=0.1; mindp=1; maxdp=14;  bydp=1 ; trait.name="YLD"; 

result=power.12F.LocxRep(expdesign, expt1$experiment_name[1],number_of_fields,number_of_hybrids_test,mean_yield_difference_percent,ckmean, cv, rLGvsE, nsub, ntrt1, ntrt2, 
                      alpha, minrep, maxrep, mindp, maxdp, bydp,  trait.name)
plot=result$plot1
plot
result$expInfo
result$tab1







```
